forYouSignals.description: Configuration for For You feed signals

fields.description: Show papers from user's research fields

trending.description: Show trending papers in user's fields

relatedPapersSignals.description: Configuration for related papers panel signals

bibliographicCoupling.description: Show papers that cite the same references

main.description: User discovery preferences for personalized recommendations

enablePersonalization.description: Enable personalized recommendations based on profile

enableForYouFeed.description: Show the For You personalized feed

forYouSignals.description: Signals to use for For You recommendations

relatedPapersSignals.description: Signals to use for related papers

showRecommendationReasons.description: Show explanations for why papers are recommended

recommendationDiversity.description: How diverse recommendations should be relative to user's fields

minimumEndorsementThreshold.description: Minimum number of endorsements for a paper to appear in recommendations

followedFieldUris.description: Field URIs the user follows for discovery (distinct from work fields in profile)

followingTabIncludesWorkFields.description: Whether the Following tab also includes the user's work fields
